name: Nonrecognition of Gain on Securities Lending

eligibility.description: The agreement must provide for the return of identical securities, payment of equivalent distributions (dividends/interest), and not reduce the transferor's risk of loss or opportunity for gain.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: No gain or loss is recognized when a taxpayer transfers securities pursuant to a qualifying lending agreement that requires the return of identical securities.
